title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions:
Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India Ventures Solutions!
